nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, paragraph-aligned twelve-segment trilingual entry through the first prologue movement
nodes.distilled_thesis: The first prologue movement turns Zarathustra's chosen solitude into overflowing descent and recurrent return: inward ripening becomes gift, blessing, going-under, and renewed human becoming.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the bounded prologue route, becoming names the inner transformation by which Zarathustra's ripened solitude turns outward into gift, descent, and renewed human motion.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the bounded prologue route, overcoming names the passage beyond passive inheritance through deliberate down-going, transformed valuation, and a will to give rather than hoard.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
nodes.distilled_thesis: The prologue begins precisely through going-under, so descent is not merely a cost of the route but the inaugural form in which the route first comes into action.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4
nodes.distilled_thesis: Blessing appears here as reciprocal rather than unilateral, because overflow and reception answer one another within the same bounded movement.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
nodes.distilled_thesis: The bounded route binds gift to descent: to give is already to move downward toward others rather than remain above them.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7
nodes.distilled_thesis: Once wisdom becomes overflow, it seeks recipients and cannot remain self-contained without betraying its own abundance.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: Gift appears here in two coordinated modes, bestowal and distribution, so giving is already articulated as more than a single undifferentiated outpouring.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the bounded prologue, going-under names the humanly grasped form of descent, joining katabasis to an addressable human path.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.2
nodes.distilled_thesis: Solar happiness in the bounded prologue route is relational: it requires recipients of light and does not complete itself in isolation.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the bounded route, overflow is not only emitted but genuinely received, so reciprocity belongs to abundance before abundance becomes a further gift.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
nodes.distilled_thesis: The bounded route distinguishes source radiance from carried reflection: bliss is not owned by the vessel, yet its reflected light can still be borne outward.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
nodes.distilled_thesis: Return in the current route is an enacted re-entry into the human after ripening, not yet the doctrinal surface of eternal return.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1|seg.1.1.1.5
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the bounded prologue route, solitude is not emptiness but a ripening state whose inward duration prepares transformation and later gift.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10
nodes.distilled_thesis: The route asks for a vision calm enough to behold excessive happiness without envy, making blessing depend on a purified way of seeing rather than on possession.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: The prologue turns matured solitude into a wisdom that can overfill itself and therefore cannot remain closed within private possession.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local lineage surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and the full distilled principle spine of prologue-1, with commentary-like residue still deferred in intake
nodes.distilled_thesis: This lineage node names the bounded prologue-1 route in which Zarathustra's ripened solitude turns through reception, dual-mode gift, descent, tranquil non-envious vision, carried reflection, and beginning-through-going-under into a legible movement from becoming toward overcoming.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.8|seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
nodes.distilled_thesis: By the end of the bounded slice, Zarathustra's going-under is no longer merely announced; it has begun as the route's operative movement.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7
nodes.distilled_thesis: The prologue shifts from possession to bestowal: what has ripened must now be given and distributed rather than merely retained.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4
nodes.distilled_thesis: Zarathustra blesses the sun for its abundance, naming overflow as a gift received rather than a possession hoarded.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1
nodes.distilled_thesis: At the opening of the route, Zarathustra turns outward in a dawn address to the sun, beginning the movement from ripened solitude into spoken relation.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1
nodes.distilled_thesis: The prologue begins by leaving mountain homeland and lake behind, marking a spatial break from reflective origin before the later turn toward humans.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
nodes.distilled_thesis: Gift immediately takes the form of downward movement, so descent into depth becomes the enacted route of what must be bestowed.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
nodes.distilled_thesis: The route explicitly names descent as going-under, giving the downward motion its first decisive human and verbal form.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8|seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.12
nodes.distilled_thesis: Going-under turns toward humans as its destination, so descent is no longer only an image but an active approach to human recipients.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10
nodes.distilled_thesis: At the overflowing moment, golden water begins to flow from the cup, marking release rather than retention as the next dynamic phase.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1
nodes.distilled_thesis: Within the first paragraph, the long mountain duration resolves into a changed heart, making inward ripening the immediate precondition of speech and descent.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4
nodes.distilled_thesis: The morning stance of waiting keeps the route relational: Zarathustra appears as one who has long stood ready for the sun's giving.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: Once wisdom grows overfull, the route names the need for outstretched hands, making recipients structurally necessary for gift.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5
nodes.distilled_thesis: Across the blessing and its aftermath, Zarathustra receives solar excess into himself, turning outer abundance into an inwardly held charge.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10
nodes.distilled_thesis: The cup's release sends the reflected sign of bliss outward, so joy becomes something borne abroad rather than kept enclosed.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.8|seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10
nodes.distilled_thesis: Before the cup pours out, the route pauses in a request for blessing from a tranquil eye that can behold without envy.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9|seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
nodes.distilled_thesis: The plea to bless the cup prepares outpouring by asking that what is held in fullness may now be rightly released.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.3
nodes.distilled_thesis: The remembered sun's ten-year ascent to the cave frames the route's reciprocity: light has long approached the secluded life it now addresses.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.7|seg.1.1.1.8
nodes.distilled_thesis: The sun's evening passage behind sea and underworld becomes a companion image for descent that still carries light into lower regions.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10|seg.1.1.1.11
nodes.distilled_thesis: Once full, the cup also wants to become empty again, making emptied readiness part of the route's cyclic dynamic.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.10
nodes.distilled_thesis: The cup's desire to overflow marks fullness as a state ordered toward release rather than static containment.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: Mid-route, wisdom is held as an overfull state whose pressure toward giving explains why descent becomes necessary.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6
nodes.distilled_thesis: Joy is locally remeasured here: blessed happiness is no longer mere possession but something judged by its capacity to be given.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.2
nodes.distilled_thesis: The second paragraph holds happiness as relational: even solar abundance needs recipients if its joy is to remain meaningful.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.1
nodes.distilled_thesis: Before speech, Zarathustra abides in ten-year mountain solitude as a ripened condition that stores the route's later movement.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.3
nodes.distilled_thesis: The cave triad marks a condition against sterile self-saturation, implying that even light would grow sated without relation and return.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.9
nodes.distilled_thesis: The tranquil eye without envy names the steady condition needed to bless overflowing without resentment or grasping.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local state surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.11|seg.1.1.1.12
nodes.distilled_thesis: In parallel with the cup, Zarathustra holds the state of wanting to become human again, so return appears as an active readiness rather than a completed fact.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.9 (1,1,1,9)
nodes.distilled_thesis: All-too-great happiness is the overwhelming object beheld by the tranquil eye without envy.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The bee is the image-bearing gatherer that supports the route's scene of accumulated sweetness without itself becoming canonical analogy doctrine.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Bestowal names one mode of the gift as Zarathustra's abundance begins to move outward.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.9 (1,1,1,9)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Blessing is the act-surface Zarathustra asks from the tranquil eye before the overflowing cup scene unfolds.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Bliss names the high solar joy whose reflection the cup carries abroad.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The cave marks the threshold place of solitude and reception, the height to which the sun has long come.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The cup is the vessel-symbol that gathers, overflows, empties, and parallels Zarathustra's own motion.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Dawn is the time-sign that frames Zarathustra's first direct address to the sun.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.7 (1,1,1,7)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Depth is the destination-symbol of descent, the lower direction that gift must take.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Distribution names the second mode of the gift, turning Zarathustra's abundance outward toward humans.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The eagle is one of Zarathustra's companion symbols within the route's triadic collective.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.11 (1,1,1,11)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Emptiness is the state-target toward which the cup aims when it wants to empty again.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.9 (1,1,1,9)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Envy is the excluded affect whose absence defines the tranquility of the eye.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.7 (1,1,1,7)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Evening is the time-sign of the sun's movement beyond the sea toward the underworld.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Folly is the tension-term the wise among humans are said to greet gladly in the route's revaluation scene.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.12 (1,1,1,7)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Go-under is the humanly named hinge-term that gathers descent, sunset, and approach toward human recipients.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Gold is the quality that marks the water as radiant in the cup's overflowing movement.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.2 (1,1,1,2)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Happiness here is not private contentment but a relational joy whose meaning depends on those illuminated by it.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The heart marks the inner center that transforms before the route turns outward into speech.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The homeland is the settled place Zarathustra leaves at the route's opening, making departure concrete rather than merely inward.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Honey is the gathered sweetness of the bee-image, supporting the route's scene of accumulated abundance at overfull wisdom.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.11 (1,1,1,11)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The human appears here as the condition Zarathustra wants to become again, so return is anchored in renewed human nearness rather than abstraction.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Humans are the receiving horizon of the route, the human field toward which gift, going-under, and return are directed.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The lake of the homeland is the paired place-symbol left behind at the start, sharpening the opening break of the route.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Light is the radiance carried across the route, from the sun's giving to the later reflection that is borne onward.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.4 (1,1,1,4)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Morning is the recurring time of the triad's waiting for the sun.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The mountains are the withdrawn place of ascent where Zarathustra's solitude and long ripening are held.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Outstretched hands are the recipient-interface the route names as necessary for giving to become actual bestowal.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,4)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Overflow names the abundance that can be received, blessed, and later poured outward again.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Path names the route-image whose possible saturation the triadic companionship prevents in the sun scene.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The poor among humans are the subgroup whose joy is revalued toward wealth within the same human field.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.2 (1,1,1,2)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The recipients of light make solar happiness relational by naming those for whom shining has meaning.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Reflection names the carried afterglow or reflected radiance that travels outward from the overflowing cup.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.7 (1,1,1,7)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The sea functions as the threshold crossed in the sun's evening passage toward lower regions.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The serpent is one of Zarathustra's companion symbols within the route's triadic collective.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Solitude names the held condition delighted in during the mountain interval, the seclusion from which later speech and descent emerge.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Spirit is the inward resource in which Zarathustra delights during the route's long state of solitary ripening.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The sun is the route's cosmic counterpart and giving image: it shines, overflows, and models the downward movement that Zarathustra later enacts.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,9)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The tranquil eye is the solar aspect capable of blessing without envy, the calm witness asked to sanction overflow.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.3 (1,1,1,3)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The triad of Zarathustra, eagle, and serpent is the collective subject that waits, receives, and blesses together at the cave.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.7 (1,1,1,7)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The underworld names the lower region to which light is still carried in the sun's downward motion.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Water is the flowing substance that issues from the cup in the route's golden outpouring scene.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Wealth is the counterterm the poor among humans are said to greet gladly in the route's revaluation of joy.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Wisdom is the charged inner content that becomes overfull and drives the need to bestow.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.6 (1,1,1,6)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The wise among humans are the subgroup whose joy is revalued toward folly within the route's human field.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: Zarathustra is the bounded route's acting and undergoing center, the one whose solitude ripens, descends, speaks, and returns toward the human.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local analogy surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
nodes.distilled_thesis: The bee-and-honey analogy gives imagistic form to accumulated wisdom, keeping the route's scene of overfull sweetness explicit without turning the image into independent doctrine.

nodes.source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local synthesis surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.1 (1,1,1,1)
nodes.distilled_thesis: This bounded synthesis reads the departure from homeland and lake as a leaving of reflective origin, turning the opening movement into a source-linked interpretive break from mirrored beginning.
